risks.control: dependency-free static console and package file checks
risks.no_go_condition: package file, lockfile, frontend config, build step, or install instruction appears

risks.control: dry-run operator action previews and write verb checks
risks.no_go_condition: enabled write control, mutating HTTP verb, or action execution path appears

risks.control: module lifecycle blockers and activation false checks
risks.no_go_condition: activation, capability activation, runtime registration, or code loading appears

risks.control: disabled auth runtime status and mock-only claims preview
risks.no_go_condition: production auth, login/logout, token issuance, cookie issuance, or external IdP runtime appears

risks.control: synthetic local auth and read-only session preview checks
risks.no_go_condition: credential store, persisted browser session, token store, cookie store, or session writer appears
raw prompt field or source prompt rendering appears
hidden reasoning or chain-of-thought rendering appears
provider invocation, model call, provider credential flow, or external model call appears

risks.control: local-only URL and external asset checks
risks.no_go_condition: non-local URL, external script, external stylesheet, external notification, or web call appears
evidence examples are invalid, incomplete, or not marked passed

risks.control: dry-run authorization and role filter checks
risks.no_go_condition: role path grants execution, activation, external calls, or privileged bypass

risks.control: legacy contract audit plus AION-101 checkpoint validation
risks.no_go_condition: evidence file is not covered by either legacy checks or the checkpoint script
